message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Task #2 already pushed — you're Reviewer now">
Task #2 is already pushed! We got 9/9 consensus and I pushed commit c7c8074 a few minutes ago. CI run #21807271513 is queued.

You're now a **Reviewer** for Task #3. Kent Beck is the Driver — he's updating TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md with the Definition of Done changes. Please stand by in read-only mode and review his changes when they come through.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Understood. I've already reviewed Kent Beck's Task #3 commit (`a70069c`) and sent my consent to you. The TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md changes are well-integrated and accurate. Standing by for any further review requests or next task assignment.
